description_long: This is a tall, elegant wooden hutch cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and classic design details. The upper section features two glass-paneled doors with brass handles, revealing interior shelving suitable for displaying items. Below, there is a spacious open shelf area, ideal for temporary storage or workspace. The lower section consists of two solid wooden doors with matching brass handles, providing concealed storage. The cabinet stands on four small, rounded feet and has decorative molding along the top and midsection, enhancing its traditional appearance. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and well-crafted, suitable for use in urban interiors such as homes, offices, or public spaces.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden hutch cabinet with glass-paneled upper doors, an open shelf, and solid lower doors, featuring classic brass handles and decorative molding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's depth, decorative molding, and the profile of the upper and lower sections.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the glass-paneled upper doors, open shelf, and solid lower doors with brass handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the depth and profile details of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, solid wooden back with no visible openings or features.
